title: The Great Train Robbery That Shocked a Nation

segments.text: In 1963, a group of robbers made off with £2.6 million.
They stopped a Royal Mail train in a daring nighttime heist.
Using fake signals, they diverted the train to a secluded area.
In just 30 minutes, they loaded cash into vehicles.
While many were caught, much of the money was never recovered.
A heist that remains legendary and unsolved in parts.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1963, robbers stole millions from a train, but some money was never found. Follow for daily cold cases!
